title: The Franky Family’s Attack
description: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: better not move around too much...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Can you hear me, USOPP!? Wait here!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah!! That bull has gone berserk!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No matter how much you pay...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We can not fix that ship.

summary: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
